title: 2015 SALES FROM U.S. CERTIFIED ORGANIC PRODUCTION UP 13 PERCENT FROM 2014, USDA REPORTS
summary: Today, the U.S. Department of Agriculture’s National Agricultural Statistics Service (NASS) released the results of the 2015 Certified Organic Survey, which show that 12,818 certified organic farms in the United States sold a total of $6.2 billion in organic products in 2015, up 13 percent from $5.5...
